description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a knee-length dress that features a fitted bodice and a flared skirt. The dress has a floral-patterned yoke and sleeve area, as well as a matching floral trim at the hem, giving it a classic and slightly formal appearance. She is wearing high-heeled shoes, which add to her height and suggest a sense of style suitable for urban or semi-formal environments. Her arms are relaxed and slightly extended at her sides, and her posture is upright. The figure has short, neatly styled hair with a side part, and her facial features are neutral. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and well-groomed.
description: An adult woman stands upright in a floral-trimmed, knee-length dress with high heels and short, styled hair. Her appearance is neat and formal, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the floral yoke and trim, fitted bodice, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dress's flare, arm position, and shoe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the dress, floral trim, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dress's silhouette and shoe.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length dress with fitted bodice, flared skirt, and floral-patterned yoke and trim
